code.description: The governed condition code (into a `conditions`/`obligations` CodeSet).

retainFor.description: ISO-8601 retention duration for post-approval-obligation conditions (e.g. `P5Y`).

description:
An attached, individually-stateful condition on an Outcome (doc 04 §5.5). Its shape is frozen here
as a canonical `$ref`-able contract; its lifecycle transitions live with the Case layer that owns it.
